titleStmt.title: SII 41.445: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 445. (A.R. No. 660 of 1905.) Tirttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tīrthagirisvara temple on the hill at Tīrttamalai.

summary.p: Records that Aṟputamaḻagiyār alias Ayyanāyaṉār, the wife of Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-Kaṟkaṭamārāyan Chokkapperumāḷ, the chief of Kūḍal in Puṟamalai-nāḍu set up the image of Kuṉṟameṟindaperumāḷ and donated a number of ornaments to the shrine.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarācatevaṟku
yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu puṟamalaināṭṭuk kūṭaluṭaiya kaṇṇanmalai
yan muṭikoṇṭacoḻa kaṟkaṭamārāyan cokkapperumāḷ
teviyār kiḻaic coḻaṅkap pallavaraiyar makaḷārātittā
ḻvār peṟṟa piḷḷai Aṟputamaḻakiyarāna Aiyyanāyaṉār marit
tuk kuṉṟameṟinta perumāḷai Eḻuntaruḷuvittu Iṭṭa tiruvā
paraṇam tiruttoṭu Iraṇṭiṉāliṭai Accu tūkkam Urai Eṭ
ṭemukkāl tirukkāṟai Onṟiṉāliṭai Accumiraṇṭu paṇattūkkam
Urai Eḻum vāḷi muttiraṇṭum pavaḻam Onṟum poṉṉumakappaṭa Ā
ṟu paṇattūkkam Urai Eḻarai poṟpūṇnūliṭai Onpatekā
l paṇattūkkam Urai Eṭṭemukkāl veḷḷippūṇnūliṭai
kāciṭai Araikkaḻañcu muttum pavaḻamum vaṭamuṉṟu muttu to
ṇṇūṟṟāṟu pavaḻam Aṟupatteḻum Iṭṭa pākalam Iṭai muppa
tum tiruvaṭṭaṇaikkāliṭai nāṟpatu taṇṇiramutu vaṭṭilli
ṭai kaicukuṟaiyu Aṟupaṇam tiruvaṭṭamaṇi Iṭai Añcupaṇa
ttūkkam Urai Eṭṭemukkāl maṇi patiṉāṟum tiruvamutupaṭikku
ṭalākak kuṉṟameṟinta perumāḷ nallūrāna ceṅkaṟkayat
til Āyamantarāyamum meliṟaip poṉṉum viṭuviccut taṉta
nilamvi ṭen kaṟkaṭamārācaṉ cokkapperumāḷen Ituta
mariyiṭaikkāṟāmpacuk koṉṟāṉ piramakatti*
(Built in)
Digital edition of SII 41.445 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
